headline: Is Southwest still a discount airline? CFO discusses after earnings miss

headline: Southwest Airlines shares are trading lower after the company reported worse-than-expected Q1 financial results and issued Q2 adjusted EPS guidance with its midpoint below estimates. Also, the company said updating its FY adjusted EPS guidance would not be productive due to ongoing macroeconomic uncertainty.
